Privacy

Commercial technology and building systems

Commercial cabling, access control, WiFi, surveillance, and intercom for better-managed buildings

Opticable designs, installs, and manages security, access, WiFi, intercom, and network infrastructure for commercial and multi-tenant buildings across Quebec.

Request a quoteView all services
Installation + supportUnified ecosystemOccupied buildingsMulti-building portfolios
  • IP cameras for entries, parking areas, and common spaces
  • Access control and intercom for doors, lobbies, and visitors
  • Commercial WiFi for offices, retail spaces, and shared areas
  • Structured cabling, fiber, racks, and network rooms

Operating environments

Systems installed in real operating environments

InstallationSystems and infrastructure
Ongoing supportManagement, maintenance, support
TerritoryMontreal, Laval, Longueuil, and across Quebec

Services

Installation, support, and infrastructure

Opticable combines system installation, ongoing management, and supporting infrastructure to deliver more coherent systems.

Service line 01

System installation

Cameras, access control, intercom, and WiFi installed around the reality of the building, its entries, and its occupants.

Security camerasAccess controlIntercomCommercial WiFi

Service line 02

Supporting infrastructure

Structured cabling, fiber optic links, racks, patch panels, IP telephony, and technical rooms that give the site a clean foundation.

Structured cablingFiber opticNetwork infrastructureIP telephony

Service line 03

Ongoing management and support

Maintenance, technical support, system administration, and post-installation adjustments so you do not have to start from zero when needs change.

Security camerasAccess controlCommercial WiFiNetwork infrastructure

Services

Our services, installation, support, and infrastructure

We install, integrate, and manage building systems for commercial properties. One partner, from the first cable run through ongoing support.

Security cameras

CCTV

Installation, configuration, remote viewing, and support for IP cameras covering entries, parking areas, and common spaces.

View service

Access control

ACCESS

Readers, locks, panels, and door cabling to manage entries, lobbies, and restricted areas more effectively.

View service

Commercial WiFi

WIFI

Coverage planning, professional access points, maintenance, and support for offices, retail spaces, and shared environments.

View service

Intercom

INTERCOM

Audio or video intercom systems for lobbies, gates, and visitor entry points, integrated with access control and the network.

View service

IT services

IT

Device management, network support, maintenance, and technical support for your environment after installation.

View service

IP telephony

VOIP

SIP lines, IP handsets, business numbers, and VoIP-ready cabling for offices and workspaces.

View service

Structured cabling

CAB

Cat 5e, Cat 6, Cat 6A, coaxial, patch panels, testing, and documentation for a clean, durable network foundation.

View service

Promo

Limited-time offer: lock in a promo code before requesting a quote.

Use the promo entry page to collect your one-time code before the campaign ends, then continue into the normal quote flow with a better-qualified lead.

Equipment

Brands we install and support

We work with commercial-grade equipment recognized across the industry.

Ubiquiti (UniFi)
MikroTik
Fortinet
Hikvision
Uniview (UNV)
TP-Link Omada
Akuvox

Why choose Opticable

Why choose Opticable

We do not just hand over equipment. We organize systems that are easier to operate, built to last, and easier to expand without starting over.

A building-wide view

Access control, cameras, WiFi, and the network are planned together from the start, not patched together afterward as separate systems.

Clean, durable installations

Labeling, racks, finishing, and documentation are handled carefully so the final system is clear and durable.

Easier to operate

Your team inherits systems that are better organized and easier to maintain, expand, and support over time.

Our installation method

A well-delivered project starts with proper preparation.

01

Site evaluation

We review your needs, entries, sensitive areas, and the infrastructure already in place.

02

Clear recommendation

You receive a proposal suited to your building, budget, and timeline, without surprises.

03

Clean installation

Our teams install, test, and identify the components carefully. The site is left clean.

04

Commissioning and support

We validate the full system, hand over a documented setup, and stay available for ongoing management and support.

Who we serve

Solutions shaped for real site conditions

We work in occupied buildings, mixed-use sites, and environments where continuity of operations matters.

Businesses, offices, and retail spaces

Security, WiFi, connectivity, and entry systems for operations that need to stay stable every day.

Multi-tenant buildings

Intercom, access control, cameras, WiFi, and cabling for common spaces, lobbies, and occupied environments.

Commercial multi-tenant properties

Building systems planned for shared spaces, technical rooms, and day-to-day operations.

Property managers and developers

One partner for upgrades, multi-building standardization, and site coordination.

Let’s discuss your project

Need a technology partner for your building?

Tell us about your building, the systems you need, and your timeline. We will come back with a clear proposal suited to your reality. Opticable serves commercial buildings in Montreal, Laval, Longueuil, and across Quebec.

Request a quoteView all services

Opticable installs and supports cameras, access, WiFi, intercom, cabling, and network infrastructure for commercial buildings in Montreal, Laval, Longueuil, and across Quebec.
